data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for form completion deadline.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the form completion deadline, which states that the form must be completed 24 hours before the appointment. However, the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The evidence only describes the functionality of the intake form without explicitly addressing the deadline aspect, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of the form completion deadline requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for form completion deadline
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the form completion deadline requirement.
